Automatically copy selected text from any website.

AutoCopy Plus is a smart and lightweight Chrome extension that makes copying and pasting text faster and easier across all websites.

✅ Key Features

🔹 Auto-Copy on Selection
Automatically copies any text you highlight — no need to right-click or press Ctrl+C.

🔹 Paste Button in Text Fields
Adds a small 📋 paste button inside every input and textarea so you can paste text directly with one click — perfect for forms, content fields, and messages.

🔹 Enable/Disable Anytime
Easily toggle AutoCopy and Paste Button features from the extension popup.

🔹 Copy History
Keeps a history of recently copied text. Tap any item to copy it again instantly.

🔹 Works Even on Non-Copyable Sites
Bypasses most site restrictions and lets you copy text even from protected content areas.

🔹 Clean & Lightweight
No clutter, no tracking, and minimal UI. Built for speed and privacy.
הפוך טקסט מעברית לאנגלית ולהפך בקלות

"מתקן מקלדת" הוא תוסף דפדפן ייחודי המיועד לתקן טקסטים שנכתבו בשפה אחת תוך שימוש במקלדת של שפה אחרת. התוסף מתמקד במקרים שבהם משתמשים כותבים בטעות בעברית עם מקלדת אנגלית או להפך, ומאפשר להם להמיר בקלות את הטקסט לשפה הנכונה.
Wtyczka ułatwiająca pracę z Panelem Partnera Programu Partnerskiego Ceneo.pl

Program Partnerski Ceneo.pl to forma współpracy pomiędzy Ceneo.pl, a właścicielami witryn internetowych.
Współpraca opiera się na relacjach partnerskich, a dołączenie do naszego Programu jest całkowicie bezpłatne.
Uczestnictwo w Programie Partnerskim Ceneo.pl to prosty i bezpieczny sposób
na zarobienie dodatkowych pieniędzy bez wychodzenia z domu.
Wtyczka pozwala na szybkie generowanie linków tekstowych bezpośrednio ze strony Ceneo.pl zawierających niezbędne do rozliczeń znaczniki.
Takie linki możesz łatwo wkleić na swoją stronę aby zacząć zarabiać z nami.
Przy pierwszym uruchomieniu należy skonfigurować wtyczkę przez dodanie swojego indywidualnego numeru ID Partnera.

Jeśli jeszcze nie jesteś naszym partnerem, zarejestruj się: https://partnerzy.ceneo.pl/Account/Register.

Multi-network Crypto Wallet in Your Browser

A secure wallet and gateway to the blockchain world for various EVM-compatible networks. Whether you're an experienced user or new to cryptocurrencies, our wallet will help you connect to the decentralized internet of the future.

Key features:
• Support for multiple EVM-compatible networks, including Ethereum, Binance Smart Chain, Polygon, and others.
• Buy, send, store, and exchange digital assets.
• Built-in token swap function across different networks.
• Securely connect to decentralized applications (dApps) for trading, lending, gaming, and more.

Join the world of decentralized finance with our versatile and secure wallet!
Right-Click Magic: Open Tabs, View or Download Images, Hover Zoom, Search
Your custom right-click rules. Open links, view or download hi-res images, zoom on hover, search selected text, copy text & paste.

Imagine browsing, researching, and shopping without ever reaching for your keyboard. With Right-Click Magic, you can. 
Effortlessly fill forms, copy text between pages, search for ideas, and download images—all with a simple, powerful right-click. Work faster and easier, with fewer clicks and keystrokes. ✨

This extension transforms your right-click into a customizable, one-click shortcut for your most common actions, saving you time and effort on every page you visit.

What Can You Do with It? 🚀

🔗 Link Actions:
• Open Links Instantly: Simply right-click any link to open it in a new tab. No more "Right-click → Find menu item → Click".
• Powerful Modifiers: Need more control? Use Ctrl + Right-Click to open a link in an Incognito window, or Shift + Right-Click for a New Window.
• Tab Control: Customize whether new tabs open in the background or immediately become active, and where they are placed.

🖼️ Image Actions:
• Hover Zoom 🔎: Simply hover your mouse over an image to see a beautiful, full-screen preview. Perfect for quickly viewing images on shopping sites, galleries, and social media.
• One-Click Actions: Set your default right-click action on any image:
View Image: Open a stunning, full-screen overlay to see every detail.
Download Image 💾: Instantly save the image—no keyboard shortcuts needed. It intelligently finds the highest resolution version available!
Open Image: Open the image directly in a new tab.
• Works Everywhere: Our smart detection finds the image even if it's hidden under a transparent link or overlay.

✍️ Text Actions:
• Smart Selection Actions: Right-clicking with text selected is now context-aware!
  - Search Instantly 🌐: Right-click directly on selected text to search for it using your favorite engine (Google, DuckDuckGo, etc.).
Link Search Override 🔍: Need to look up the words inside a link? Highlighting a link and right-clicking it will now smartly search the selected text instead of opening the URL!
  - Copy Effortlessly 📋: Right-click anywhere else to instantly copy the selection. Perfect for moving info from one page to another without touching Ctrl+C.
• Quick Paste: Right-click inside any text field to instantly paste. Effortlessly fill out forms using the text you just copied.

Fully Customizable for You ✅
You are in complete control. Use the simple settings panel to enable, disable, and combine features to create your perfect workflow.
• Enable only the features you need.
• Choose your preferred search engine.
• Fine-tune the hover zoom delay.
• Your settings are always saved and will not be reset when the extension is updated!

Download HTML code in ChatGPT's 'GPT-4o with canvas' model and UI.

Use this extension to easily and instantly download your HTML code directly within OpenAI's "ChatGPT-4o with canvas" model/UI.

This tool adds a download icon to the canvas interface for HTML/CSS code canvases, allowing you to instantly download the code displayed in the canvas without the need to copy to a notepad or code editor.

With a single click, the extension copies your code and surfaces a save dialog to download as HTML.

**Please read the caveats below**

Easy as 1-2-3:

1. Generate new HTML/CSS code, or view already generated canvas code, in "ChatGPT-4o with canvas" at chatgpt.com, chat.openai.com, or chat.com.

2. When the canvas opens automatically, or you open it manually on existing canvas code, the download button should appear at the top-right of the canvas within a second or two.

3. Press the download button to download your HTML/CSS code.

Caveats:

- You must be in the "ChatGPT-4o with canvas" model/UI.

- HTML/CSS code canvases must start with '<!DOCTYPE html>' or the download button won't appear.

Donate: https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=DQ5LYLT8NA26W


download icon PNG (as seen in canvas UI) designed by 588ku from https://pngtree.com/freepng/file-download-icon_4647924.html?sol=downref&id=bef
Restores Cmd/Ctrl+V in password fields on Hikvision camera admin pages that block pasting.

Hikvision camera admin pages block pasting into the login password field. If you use a password manager with long, randomly generated passwords, you're forced to type them by hand every time you sign in.

This extension fixes that. Press Cmd+V (Mac) or Ctrl+V (Windows/Linux) in the password field and your clipboard contents are written directly into the field — bypassing the page's paste blocker and pushing the value into the page's form model so the login actually works.

Note, this works on my Hikvision cameras but I obviously haven't been able to test it on the enormous number of models they have. Sorry if it doesn't work on yours -- I'm unlikely to be able to add support without the camera to test with.
Protects the user from having the selected text of a web page changed when they are trying to copy text

This is a Chrome plugin that protects the browser from the copy paste hack that is shown here https://marco97pa.github.io/copy-paste-hack-js/

By default a confirmation dialogue will be displayed if the copied text is different than the selected text the user can change the setting to have the copied text be auto corrected in the clipboard without confirmation.

Scribo for Google Docs extension for Chrome

Meet Scribo for Google Docs—the essential tool for English and humanities teachers committed to lifting student writing skills. Grounded in research and trusted by some of the world’s most demanding education systems, Scribo's intuitive AI streamlines the time-consuming tasks of grading and feedback, freeing teachers to focus on inspiring and guiding their students.

Scribo for Google Docs enables seamless grading and feedback with your choice of our rubrics or your own, easily uploaded in seconds. You can also opt for standards, or choose from an extensive library of writing goals. With just a few clicks, you can insert analysis, grades, and personalized feedback directly into student documents, empowering them to improve.

By saving time and offering actionable data, Scribo empowers teachers to engage more deeply with their students, providing targeted support where it's needed most. Join the community of educators transforming their teaching with Scribo and make writing skill development effective and rewarding, one piece of feedback at a time.

TextPie Text Expander and Canned Responses
TextPie is an extension for canned responses and text expansion, allowing you to craft replies once and reuse them with one click.

Forget about copy-pasting text from multiple templates. With TextPie, an autofill text expander, you will just need 2 seconds and 1 button.

• Reach 100 people with TextPie as you would reach 10 by doing it manually.
• Close more vacant jobs or sales deals.
• Increase the open rate for cold outreach.
• Forget about manually typing names, positions or dates. TextPie will autofill it for you.

You need TextPie if you:

• Have too much documents with outreach copies.
• Spend in average 2 hours on switching between tabs, manually copying each message.
• Underperform because you spend to much time on manual rut and make small typos in names and dates.
• Feel burnt out because manual tasks affect your motivation.

Just use TextPie for any daily work routine and achieve more. 🚀

Upload your text templates and use them on any messaging platform like Linkedin or Gmail. Just type // on your keybord or click on TextPie icon and access multiple of your templates. Pick one you need and it automatically appears on scree, no more copy-paste.

Smart automation which is efficient and incredibly addictive

Your messages will be personalized by default with our dynamic variables. TextPie automatically adds specific details like names, dates, or other custom information to your messages or emails. No more manual data input or typos, it’s on us.

Ready to use templates, no need for a copywriter

Explore our Template Gallery to get ready to use templates for any purpose — a work email, cold outreach, cover letter or connection request. Lacking time for copywriting? Just pick your industry or communication goal, we have templates for any need.

Still in doubt?

• TextPie is simple. We’re still surprised that it’s just 1 button and you access hundreds of easily organized templates.
• TextPie is secure. We put your data safety first. We protect your templates and personal information from any breach.
• TextPie can be used anywhere. Integrate it with all digital platforms like Linkedin, Gmail or Upwork. 

Transform the way you communicate: we minimize the manual work, you make fewer mistakes and achieve more goals with TextPie.
Top case of using TextPie in workflow:

🤝 Prospecting and outreach for Sales 
• TextPie cuts down the time I spend on prospecting, letting me reach more potential clients faster using templates and variables.
• Create templates with dynamic variables for frequently used sales pitches, email templates, or proposals and follow ups.

Ideal for multitasking across platforms like LinkedIn, Gmail, and Salesforce, Upwork. TextPie is a must-have for sales professionals looking to streamline operations and enhance productivity

🧑‍💼 Talent sourcing and Talent acquisition for Recruiters 
• Send personalized messages fast to keep candidates interested.
• Automatically insert the right details like names into your messages to avoid mistakes.
• Answer candidates with just one click, making communication swift and easy.

TextPie is ideal for recruiters and talent acquisition specialists managing multiple candidates on platforms like LinkedIn, Dribbble, and email, helping you work more efficiently.

👋  Customer support and Customer Success 
• Personalize and send any repetitive message 10X faster, whether it’s to customers or teammates
• Quickly respond to common questions, keeping your replies consistent and your customers happy
• Communicate fast and close more customer tickets.

🦄 For Founders, Executives and Startups 
• Easily customize and send messages to expand your network, connect with investors, or collect user feedback.
• Allow your team to quickly handle frequently asked questions on any platform, including email, chat, and social media.

💫  For Marketing and PR specialists
• Use templates for common marketing phrases, comments, social media posts, or ad copy. 
• Send personalized messages to journalists quickly to boost your media outreach.

👩‍🏫  For Tutors and Educators 
• Quickly send notes, answer common questions, or send reminders about sessions and meetings.
• Set up shortcuts for phrases or feedback comments you use often. This is particularly useful when grading papers or giving repeated instructions.

👨‍🎓 For Job seekers and Students   
• Personalize your chats with recruiters using dynamic variables for a custom touch.
• Create your elevator pitch once and send it off in one click to impress hiring managers.
• Automate your job search tasks, letting you get more done every day.

🤖 For working with AI & ChatGPT 
• Quickly retrieve your saved prompts whenever you need them without searching through previous chats.
• Store any prompts you use often as templates with just a single click.

👩‍💼 For Lawyers and Legal support  
• Create shortcuts for commonly used legal terms, clauses, or citations. This speeds up document drafting, research, and answering common client questions.


For any questions about TextPie, please email us at <support@TextPie.io>

Copy multiple items to the clipboard and view them easily.

Clipboard Manager (Multi Copy & Paste)

Clipboard Manager is your essential tool for managing multiple clipboard entries efficiently. Whether you're a student, professional, or anyone who deals with a lot of text, this extension saves time by allowing you to easily copy, store, and retrieve multiple clipboard items. Enhance your productivity with features like:

What's new?
- We have enabled a shortcut to quickly open the clipboard by just pressing Ctrl/CMD + Shift + V
- Enhanced UI for pop-up which also shows complete text on hover if it's too long
- Repeat content copy is deduped i.e. you won't see them twice!
- A zero state to give tips on best use
- New Logo!

Multiple Clipboard Entries: Store unlimited clipboard items for later use.
- Quick Access: Retrieve clipboard entries quickly with a simple click.
-Seamless Integration: Works across all websites, ensuring your clipboard is always at your fingertips.
-Secure and Private: Your data is stored locally and never shared or accessed by third parties.

Say goodbye to the limitations of the single clipboard and unlock a world of efficiency with Clipboard Manager.
Paste wherever the f_ck you want

A simple browser extension that allows pasting in input fields, even in fields where pasting has been disabled.

Improves user experience and allows pasting complex passwords copied from password managers for when autofill isn’t fully supported.

The paste shortcut is preset based on the user’s device, `⌘Cmd + Shift + V` for Mac and `Ctrl + Shift + V` for Windows and Linux, but it can also be modified to suit individual preferences.

LIMITATIONS
- The extension only supports force pasting in the following input types: email, number, password, search, tel, text, and url.
- Select and replace pasting works for all supported inputs except for email and number. So pasting anywhere in these fields would overwrite them.
- Force pasting in paste-disabled fields doesn't work when the field contains text that is selected in its entirety. This a side effect of a safeguard put in place to avoid duplicate pasting in the very rare case where a paste-enabled field's text is selected in its entirety and replaced with the same text as before (therefore should remain unchanged). IF YOU EVER FACE THIS ISSUE, SIMPLY CLEAR THE FIELD BEFORE PASTING AND IT SHOULD WORK AS EXPECTED.
Export ChatGPT Conversations (MarkDown and Plain Text)

My extension supports code and mathematical symbol formatting, making it a perfect tool for developers, and researchers. Not only this is useful in documentation but also in re-prompting and prompt engineering.
CopyGOAT: Auto Text Expander for Google Chrome
No. #1 Text Expander - Create custom keyboard shortcuts to expand and replace text as you type.

Let's be honest about traditional text expanders. They are built to save you time, but they often end up giving you a new, frustrating job: memorizing dozens of obscure keyboard shortcuts. When you are rushing to reply to a client or send an outreach email, trying to remember if your shortcut was "/thanks", "/thx", or "/ty" causes cognitive overload. Instead of typing faster, you freeze, search your memory, or end up typing the whole message manually anyway.
CopyGOAT was built to fix this exact problem. It is a text expander that forgives your memory.

With CopyGOAT, forgetting a shortcut is perfectly fine. You do not need a photographic memory to use your templates. Just type your trigger key (like "/") and start typing a related word. A smart, visual suggestion menu instantly appears right at your cursor. You can see your snippets, search them on the fly, and insert them with a single keystroke. It is fast, visual, and completely stress-free.

Whether you are in customer support, sales, recruiting, or simply tired of typing the same email responses over and over, CopyGOAT adapts to your workflow with powerful, professional features.

Core Features:

Smart Auto-Suggest Menu
Never memorize a shortcut again. Type your prefix, and a sleek dropdown menu appears right where you are typing. Browse, filter, and select your canned responses without breaking your focus.

Dynamic Smart Variables
Do not just paste static text. Make your snippets intelligent. Automatically insert today's date, your current clipboard content, or the URL of the page you are currently viewing.

Custom Fill-in-the-Blank Placeholders
Need to personalize an email? Create custom variables like {{First Name}} or {{Price}}. When you trigger the snippet, CopyGOAT will prompt you to fill in these exact details before pasting the final, polished message.

Advanced Rich Text Formatting
Your templates should not look like plain text robots. The built-in editor allows you to add bold text, bulleted lists, hyperlinks, custom text colors, and even images directly into your snippets.

Domain-Specific Snippets
Keep your workspace perfectly organized. You can set specific templates to only appear on certain websites. Show your support templates only on Zendesk, and your networking outreach templates only on LinkedIn.

Seamless Google Drive Sync
If you work across multiple computers, your templates should follow you. Connect your Google Drive once, and your entire snippet library will silently sync in the background. No manual file transfers required.

Secure Data Export and Import
Have full control over your data. Export your entire snippet library as a JSON file for local backup or share it with your team members to standardize your company's communication.

Privacy First Approach
Your templates, emails, and snippets are your private data. CopyGOAT does not store your snippets on proprietary cloud servers. Your data lives locally on your browser and syncs securely through your own personal Google Drive account. 

Stop wasting mental energy trying to remember abbreviations. Upgrade your typing workflow with a visual snippet manager that works the way your brain actually does.
